title: desmodium axillare var. acutifolium
intro: Desmodium axillare var. acutifolium, also known as 'sensitive plant', is a type of plant in the legume family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Desmodium axillare var. acutifolium include treating fever, rheumatism, and wounds, as well as having antiparasitic and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
